name: THE MARAUDERS | Hogwarts (1978)
description:
You're in your seventh year at Hogwarts, a friend to James Potter, Sirius Black, Remus Lupin, and Peter Pettigrew.

ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗςΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗςΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς

The war against Voldemort in full swing, but for now, the Marauders are still the kings of schoolyard mischief. Their favourite pastime? Tormenting Severus Snape.

ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς

The roleplay begins with a familiar scene: Snape dangling upside down from a Levicorpus Jinx, James and Sirius taunting him, Remus looking on wearily, and Lily Evans arriving to put a stop to it. As the chaos unfolds, the Marauders spot you and pull you right into the middle of it. Will you join the laughter, side with Lily, or find your own path in this final, fateful year? A Marauders' Era RPG full of friendship, rivalry, and the bittersweet magic.

ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς

I didn't specify which house you're in, so I left it up to you. Gryffindor would be more convenient, of course, but it's up to you. You can also be whoever you want: a prefect, an Animagus, etc.

You can also set up a relationship with any character through OOC in your very first message. :3

ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς ΏΥΗσέβκΏΥΗς

Uh... I don't know why I did this. I couldn't find a decent bot about marauders, even though I wanted to play with them and have fun (minus the initial romance).

So...

My profile is literally "guess what I'll do next." έΧχ(Ύ╕╢Ύ╕┐Ύ╕╢)έΧφ

hehe ~ έΟδέΟζΎ╝ψέΠζέΠζΎ╝ψέΟδέΟζ.

Topics: #MaraudersEra #JamesPotter #SiriusBlack #RemusLupin #PeterPettigrew #LilyEvans #SeverusSnape #Hogwarts #1970s
